column4: User Story

As a Admin, I should be able to have acces to handle payroll settings for 
- Pay Period
- Workweek
- The last Pay period
- Over time calculation
- Lable exicutions
As a provider, I should be able to monitor employee compliance requirements.
As a provider, I should be able to track vacation and PTO.
As a provider, I should be able to manage timesheets based on patient service hours.

As a staff member, my timesheets should be automatically generated from my EVV clock in/out records and scheduled shift data, eliminating manual time entry and ensuring accurate billing and payroll records.

As a payroll administrator, the system should automatically calculate overtime (daily/weekly thresholds), shift differentials (night/weekend/holiday rates), and premium pay based on configurable rules, with clear breakdown showing regular hours, overtime hours, and applicable rates for each timesheet entry.

As a supervisor, I should be able to review submitted timesheets with flagged discrepancies (late clock-ins, missing punches, overtime alerts), approve or reject with comments, and route to payroll once approved, with staff receiving notifications of approval status and required corrections.

As a payroll administrator, I should be able to export approved timesheets in the required format for my payroll vendor (ADP, Gusto, Paychex, QuickBooks) with employee ID mapping, hours breakdown by pay type, and automated file transmission or download for seamless payroll processing.

As a HR Admin, I should be able to view summary cards on header
- Total Employees
- Pending Leave Approvals
- Documents Expiring
- Payroll Status

As a HR Admin, I should be able see "Leave Requests Awaiting Approval" section with list of pending leave requests with -  
- Record count(On section header)
- Employee name,
- Dates : From - To
- Leave request type
- Status

As a HR Admin, I should be able to see "Compliance Alert" section with list of expiring documents
- Record count(On section header)
- Employee name
- Work Visa/ Certification/  Background Check doc
- Expiry date
As a HR Admin, I should be able to view "Workforce Movement" section with New Joiners & Exit list
As a HR Admin, I should be able to click "View All" to see complete new hire or exit lists.
As a HR Admin, I should be able to click on employee to access their profile or onboarding/exit status.

As a HR Admin, I should be able to view facilities with staff shortages showing 
- Facility name
- Shift
- Shortage count.
As a HR Admin, I should be able to click alert to view shift details and request additional staff or approve overtime.

As a HR Admin, I should be able to view recent activities
- New Hire
- Shift Update
- Exit
- Compliance Review with person and time.
As a HR Admin, I should be able to click "View All" to see complete activity history with filters.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to Add an employee with its details.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view Employees list with tabs for All, Active, and terminated employees.

As an HR Admin, I should be able to view, add/select, send and delete onboarding forms for a new employee.
ex; Background check report, Drug Screen report etc.

As an HR Admin, I should be able to upload, view, edit and delete mandatory employee documents during onboarding.
ex; Licenses, Visa Details etc.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to activate employee after verifying employee identity and background.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to send a welcome email to new employees.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to resend welcome email.

As a HR Admin, I should be able to view & edit employee information.
- Personal Details
- Other Details
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view all the employee documents in documents tab.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view employee shifts list in the employee profile
As an HR Admin, I should be able to manage employee shifts.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view Leave History list of the employee in the employee profile
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view All Timecards of the employee in employee profile.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to perform the actions on timecards of the employee.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view all shift entries including Day Off & Leave entries in day, week and month view.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view shift timeline.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to filter calendar by date range, employees, shifts, department and facility

As an HR Admin, I should be able to view all the employees leave requests.
- All, Approved, Rejected, Pending
As an HR Admin, I should be able to approve / reject employee leave request.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view leave request details for a specific request
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view a list of all employee performance reviews.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to approve employee performance request
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view employee performance details
As an HR Admin, I should be able to schedule orientation for new employee.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to assign training modules to employee.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to update training completion status for employee.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to create and submit an employee separation request for an employee
As an HR Admin, I should be able to view employees exit management list
As an HR Admin, I should be able to select employee from list to view full exit details.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to conduct exit interview

column3: Complete Exit Interview and Final Pay
column4: As an HR Admin, I should be able to view the final pay calculation and mark the employee exit process as complete to finalize the separation.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to revoke employee portal access on separation.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to terminate employee benefits
As a provider, I should be able to manage employee onboarding documentation and background checks.
As an HR Admin, I should be able to generate and download reports.

As a Supervisor, I should be able to view dashboard with - 
Today's Coverage percentage - Total Active Staff, On Shift, Pending Approvals, Upcoming Leave - Weekly Shift Calendar - Staffing Coverage Graph - Approval Queue

As a Supervisor, I should be able to access quick action buttons for 
- New Shift
- New Employee
- Label management.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to view weekly shift calendar with facility filter (ALF), week navigation, employee shifts with shift type and notes, and Day Off indicators.

As a Supervisor, I should be able to view staffing coverage graph showing 
- Required Staff
- Shortage
- Surplus by day with facility filter and legends.

As a Supervisor, I should be able to view approval queue with filter (All) showing pending leave requests with 
- Employee details
-Dates,
- Leave type
- Status.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to navigate to Shift Calendar, Requests, Timecard, Performance, Tasks, Appreciation, and Profile from sidebar.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to view shift calendar in List, Week, and Month views with employee shifts and legends.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to navigate calendar with Today, date range selection, facility filter (ALF), and view toggle.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to create employee shift schedule.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to bulk assign shifts to multiple employees.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to edit existing shift details.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to change shift type for an employee.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to assign backup staff.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to view shift requests list with status and request details.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to check availability showing existing swap requests, shift employees (1st/2nd/3rd shift), and availability conflicts.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to approve / reject a shift change request.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to View all the leave requests list
As a Supervisor, I should be able to approve / Reject leave requests and assign replacement employees.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to view particular employee leave request details
As a Supervisor, I should be able to view performance reviews list
As a Supervisor, I should be able to add employee for performance review.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to view and submit performance reviews with ratings and comments to HR Admin.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to approve timesheet submitted by staff.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to view weekly timecard list
As a Supervisor, I should be able to approve timecards or reject with reason.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to view tasks list
As a Supervisor, I should be able to add and assign tasks to employees
As a Supervisor, I should be able to edit the task assigned to employee.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to view profile with personal details and other details.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to edit profile including profile picture upload, personal details, and other details.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to log an incident report for staff.
As a Supervisor, I should be able to request attendance correction for staff.

As an Employee, I should be able to view cards
- upcoming shift card
- Leave Balance card
- Pending Requests card
- Performance Card
As an Employee, I should be able to view weekly schedule with week/month/day navigation and shift details for each day.
As an Employee, I should be able to clock in/out with timer display and break marking.
As an Employee, I should be able to view today's tasks with priority, status, assigned by details and mark tasks complete.
As an Employee, I should be able to view notice board with notices and category tags.

As an Employee, I should be able to view weekly timecard summary showing 
- Total Hours
- Break Time
- Net Hours
- Overtime.
As an Employee, I should be able to view weekly tasks by day with task details.
As an Employee, I should be able to view all timecards history
As an Employee, I should be able to send timecard to supervisor for approval
As an Employee, I should be able to submit overtime request.
As an Employee, I should be able to view all, approved, pending and rejected timesheet.
As an Employee, I should be able to submit a leave request.

As an Employee, I should be able to view leave balance cards showing 
- Annual
- Sick
- Personal
- Unpaid leave counts.
As an Employee, I should be able to view past leave requests in different tabs.
As an Employee, I should be able to cancel a pending leave request.
As an Employee, I should be able to view my assigned shift schedule.
As an Employee, I should be able to view past shift change requests with status and request details.
As an Employee, I should be able to submit shift change request
As an Employee, I should be able to view shift change request status in different tabs.
As an Employee, I should be able to accept / decline shift swap request.
As an Employee, I should be able to upload new files
As an Employee, I should be able to view and sign compliance documents.
As an Employee, I should be able to view documents
As an Employee, I should be able to download my employment documents.

As an Employee, I should be able to view tasks list in the tabs 
- All
- Completed
- Pending
- Due tasks count.
As an Employee, I should be able to update task status.
As an Employee, I should be able to log notes against a task.
As an Employee, I should be able to view pending tasks notification banner.
As an Employee, I should be able to submit expense reimbursement request.
As an Employee, I should be able to access leave request from dashboard.

As an Employee, I should be able to fill leave request form:
Start/End Data
Leave Type
Reason
As an Employee, I should be able to check leave request quota and should be able to show remaining balance

As an Employee, I should be able to see tracking status of the leave request -
Pending Supervisor
Pending HR
Approved/Rejected
As an Employee, I should be able to view my latest performance review, including rating, review period, supervisor comments, HR comments, and Growth & Feedback sections.

As an Employee, I should be able to view chat list with
- Contacts
- Message previews
- Timestamps
- Unread counts.
As an Employee, I should be able to search contacts.
As an Employee, I should be able to open chat conversation with message thread and send messages.

As a provider, I should be able to move non converted audits to convert audit as billable
- By selecting date range
As a provider, I hsould be able to view and update conversion mismatches
As a provider, I should be able to view overlapping time sheets
As a provider, I should be able to view and remove the duplictaes for the timesheets
As a provider, I should be able to remove overlapping timesheet

As a provider, I should be able to add new timesheet including details
- Client name
- Provider
- Date of service
As a provider, I should be able to get a list of drafted timesheets (incomplete timesheets or entries/ Not ready for billing)
As a provider, I should be able to apply the date filter with exceptions and without the exception (errors)

As a provider, I should be able to apply filters to sort the list of drafted timesheets
- Date range
- With & Without exceptions (errors)
- Signatures and Audits

As a provider, I should be able to apply signature filter to sort drafted timesheets as per the signature of 
- Signatre by provider
- Signatre by client
As a provider, I should be able to view the number and description of exceptions/ Errors
